title: Addis Hand Brush with Stiff Bristles and an Extra-Sturdy Handle, Metallic Silver, 1,319236
features: Ideal for indoor or outdoor use
Heavy duty stiff nylon bristle fill
Strong durable plastic body with hanging hook
Will fit standard Addis dustpan sets as replacement brush
Addis - Part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Heavy Duty Heavy duty stiff bristles that are hard-wearing for indoor and outdoor use. Strong, durable plastic body with hook for storage. Dimensions Dimensions are 29 x 117 x 17 mm. Small, compact and effective brush that is the perfect size for storage and lightweight for effective sweeping. Clips into Addis dustpan set as replacement brush. Aesthetic metallic/graphite colour.
